title: Syracuse council primary is a 3-person race after ruling keeps newcomer on ballot
summary: Syracuse Democratic primary for common council will feature three candidates competing to fill the final year of a seat, following a court ruling that kept a newcomer on the ballot. This procedural development affects local electoral processes and constituent representation.

political_signal.description: Judicial ruling on ballot access reflects internal procedural scrutiny and potential disputes over candidate eligibility or nomination processes within local democratic machinery.
